metadata.titleDefault: Viña Casa Acosta — A tribute to family
metadata.description: Family-owned boutique winery in San Vicente de Tagua Tagua, Cachapoal Valley, Chile. Handcrafted wines, vineyard tours and wine country experiences rooted in heritage.
metadata.ogTitle: Viña Casa Acosta — A tribute to family
metadata.ogDescription: Family-owned boutique winery in the Cachapoal Valley. Handcrafted wines and wine country experiences.

historia.title: Our story
historia.description: Three generations of the Acosta family in the Cachapoal Valley. From France '98 to today's winemaking legacy.

vinos.title: Our wines
vinos.description: The complete Viña Casa Acosta collection: Ombú, Lajau, Estación Francia, Berá, Guidaí and Yaráy Guá.

actividades.title: Experiences
actividades.description: Guided vineyard tours, seasonal experiences and private events at Viña Casa Acosta in the Cachapoal Valley.

contacto.title: Contact
contacto.description: Visit us in San Vicente de Tagua Tagua, Cachapoal Valley. Book tours, events or ask about our wines.

hero.eyebrow: San Vicente de Tagua Tagua · Cachapoal Valley
hero.title: A tribute to family
hero.subtitle: Where life has borne fruit with deep roots, growing dreams across generations.

about.title: Three generations, one origin.
about.paragraph1: Casa Acosta is a tribute to family. A place where life has borne fruit through deep roots in a land that nurtures dreams while honoring and strengthening its origins.
about.paragraph2: Your visit will connect you with a landscape born of grit, passion and Uruguayan bloodlines, carried forward by new generations devoted to working the Cachapoal earth.
about.imageAlt: Detail of the Casa Acosta vineyard

featured.title: Featured selection
featured.subtitle: A curated set to introduce our style.

tour.name: Vineyard tour
tour.description: Walk our historic vineyards and visit the winery.

eventos.name: Events
eventos.description: Host weddings and private events in a one-of-a-kind setting.

experiencias.name: Experiences
experiencias.description: Guided tastings, harvest days and food pairings.

cta.title: Visit us in the Cachapoal
cta.subtitle: We welcome you with family warmth. Book your visit and walk with us through the origin of every bottle.

hero.title: A love of the land, forged generation by generation.
hero.subtitle: A passion for the land and for wine, passed down each harvest, is what defines us at Viña Casa Acosta.

origin.title: An origin in Estación Francia
origin.body: The story begins with Nelson Acosta, a man with deep roots in the land and an unwavering vision. Raised near the mythical Estación Francia, he learned early to read the language of soil and climate. In 1998 he planted the first vines, laying the foundation of an unshakeable legacy.

card1.tag: II · The roots of a dream
card1.title: France '98 and the new generation
card1.body: The founding land was acquired in the spirit of the 1998 World Cup in France. Today, Nelson's son Damián carries the dream forward — bringing a contemporary vision without abandoning tradition.

card2.title: First vintage
card2.body: Our process remains zealously hands-on. That care culminated in 2003 with the first official release: the acclaimed Carmenere Reserva 'ACOSTA'.

m1998.title: The dream begins
m1998.description: Nelson Acosta plants the first vines with a long-term vision.

m2000.title: Roots take hold
m2000.description: The first vines begin to reveal the unique potential of the soil.

m2003.title: First vintage
m2003.description: Release of the acclaimed Carmenere Reserva 'ACOSTA'.

m2012.title: Sustainable expansion
m2012.description: Adoption of organic practices and a deeper commitment to the environment.

today.title: The legacy continues
today.description: Damián Acosta leads the new chapter, true to the family's roots.

family.title: Our family
family.subtitle: The people behind every bottle.
family.portraitDisclaimer: Sample portraits · to be replaced with real photographs of the family.

damian.name: Damián Acosta
damian.bio: Heir to the family's vision, pushing innovation without losing the roots.

andrea.name: Andrea Leyton
andrea.bio: Architect of memorable experiences and host of our home.

enrique.name: Enrique Pizarro
enrique.bio: Guardian of the land, safeguarding quality from the very root.

alfonso.name: Alfonso Duarte
alfonso.bio: The alchemist who translates our terroir into world-class wines.

hero.title: Our wines
hero.subtitle: A collection of honest expressions born in our boutique vineyard in the Cachapoal Valley. Each bottle tells the story of our heritage and our terroir.

lineDescriptions.Ombú: Reserve line: the most recognizable face of the winery. Wines to celebrate the everyday.
lineDescriptions.Lajau: Limited editions and ageing wines: selected parcels and small production.
lineDescriptions.Estación Francia: A tribute to our founding place and the spirit of the '98 World Cup.
lineDescriptions.Berá: Grand reserve Cabernet Sauvignon: classic elegance and structure.
lineDescriptions.Guidaí: Limited edition honoring the Charrúa word for moon.
lineDescriptions.Yaráy Guá: Fresh, fruit-forward line, designed for everyday enjoyment.

ombu-carmenere.shortDescription: Reserve Carmenere from the Cachapoal Valley.
ombu-carmenere.description: Our signature Carmenere Reserve. Ripe red fruit, sweet spice and a subtle touch of oak — a faithful reflection of the warm Cachapoal character.

ombu-tannat.description: A tribute to the family's Uruguayan roots. Firm structure, elegant tannins and aromas of dark berries with bitter chocolate.

ombu-sauvignon.description: Notes of cassis and cedar with a long, persistent finish. The classic elegance of Cabernet Sauvignon expressed through Cachapoal terroir.

lajau-sam.description: A blend that evolves in the glass. Layered complexity and very small production each harvest.

lajau-deti.description: Pure fruit expression with balanced acidity and an unmistakable silky texture. 12 months in French oak barrels.

lajau-betum.description: Deep and mysterious, with layers of flavor revealing earthy notes and black fruit. An ideal companion for the long table.

lajau-betum-yu.shortDescription: Icon Tannat — the apex of the Lajau line.
lajau-betum-yu.description: A parcel-selected expression from our finest Tannat grapes. 18 months in new oak. Ultra-limited release.

estacion-francia-carmenere.shortDescription: A tribute to our origin — France '98.
estacion-francia-carmenere.description: The line that honors the founding moment of the winery, alongside the 1998 World Cup in France. A Carmenere of great complexity, built to age.

estacion-francia-tannat.description: Powerful structure and a long, persistent finish. A Tannat that bridges Chilean terroir with the family's Uruguayan heritage.

bera.description: Imposing structure paired with elegance. Cassis, cedar and a long, persistent finish. Ready to keep growing in bottle.

guidai.description: An exclusive blend honoring the Charrúa word for 'moon'. An ageing-worthy, elegant and contemplative wine.

yaray-gua-tinto.description: A fresh, fruit-driven line built for everyday enjoyment. An ideal entry point to the Casa Acosta world.

yaray-gua-blanco.description: A Sauvignon Blanc with citrus and tropical notes. Vibrant acidity, perfect for warm days by the sea or the lake.

hero.title: Experiences
hero.subtitle: Step into the world of wine. Explore our vineyards, taste our finest creations and celebrate in a setting of warmth and heritage.

tours.title: Our tours
tours.subtitle: Discover the soul of Viña Casa Acosta through personalized walks. Each tour is designed for an intimate, educational experience.

experiences.title: Special experiences
experiences.subtitle: Walk through the cycle of the vine and celebrate key moments with us. Seasonal experiences throughout the year.

events.title: Celebrate among our vineyards
events.body: Weddings, corporate gatherings and private celebrations in a one-of-a-kind Cachapoal Valley setting. We help you design the experience from start to finish.

bullets.coordination: Full coordination with Andrea, our event planner

events.imageAlt: Long table with vineyard view set for an event

tour-ombu.name: Ombú Tour
tour-ombu.description: An introductory walk through our century-old vineyards. Ends with a tasting of 3 reserve wines paired with local cheeses.

tour-bera.name: Berá Tour
tour-bera.description: Step inside our underground cellar. Tasting of 4 grand reserve wines with curated pairings.

tour-carmenere.name: Carmenere Tour
tour-carmenere.description: Our premium experience. A deep dive into the history of our signature varietal, with tastings of historic vintages drawn straight from the barrel.

hero.title: Casa Acosta collection
hero.subtitle: Filter by line and variety. Pick your wines and we'll coordinate delivery with you.
